content.thinking:
Let me get more details on the issues:
1. The spark-data-processor Job is suspended
2. The spark-monitor deployment has a pod in ImagePullBackOff
3. The spark-batch-processor Job is suspended
4. I need to check ConfigMap 'spark-config' and Secret 'spark-credentials'

input.command: kubectl get configmap spark-config -n spark-runtime -o yaml 2>/dev/null && echo "---" && kubectl get secret spark-credentials -n spark-runtime -o yaml 2>/dev/null

input.description: Get job details for both suspended jobs

content.content:
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"batch/v1","kind":"Job","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"spark-data-processor","namespace":"spark-runtime"},"spec":{"backoffLimit":0,"suspend":true,"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"spark-data-processor"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/bash","-c","echo \"Running spark data processor\"\nexport SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)\n/opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \\\n  --master local[1] \\\n  --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \\\n  /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \\\n  200\n"],"image":"apache/spark:3.5.3","name":"spark-data-processor","resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"500m","memory":"1Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"200m","memory":"512Mi"}}}],"restartPolicy":"Never","serviceAccountName":"spark"}}}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-07-03T19:20:20Z"
  generation: 1
  labels:
    app: spark-data-processor
    batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: d3b1f5e8-a89e-47b3-ba35-b8c45066ed94
    batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-data-processor
    controller-uid: d3b1f5e8-a89e-47b3-ba35-b8c45066ed94
    job-name: spark-data-processor
  name: spark-data-processor
  namespace: spark-runtime
  resourceVersion: "2025204"
  uid: d3b1f5e8-a89e-47b3-ba35-b8c45066ed94
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  completionMode: NonIndexed
  completions: 1
  manualSelector: false
  parallelism: 1
  podReplacementPolicy: TerminatingOrFailed
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: d3b1f5e8-a89e-47b3-ba35-b8c45066ed94
  suspend: true
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: spark-data-processor
        batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: d3b1f5e8-a89e-47b3-ba35-b8c45066ed94
        batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-data-processor
        controller-uid: d3b1f5e8-a89e-47b3-ba35-b8c45066ed94
        job-name: spark-data-processor
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          echo "Running spark data processor"
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[1] \
            --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \
            /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \
            200
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: spark-data-processor
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi
          requests:
            cpu: 200m

content.content:
Name:                   spark-monitor
Namespace:              spark-runtime
CreationTimestamp:      Fri, 03 Jul 2026 14:20:14 -0500
Labels:                 <none>
Annotations:            deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: 2
                        kubernetes.io/change-cause: v2 - broken image (ImagePullBackOff)
Selector:               app=spark-monitor
Replicas:               1 desired | 1 updated | 2 total | 1 available | 1 unavailable
StrategyType:           RollingUpdate
MinReadySeconds:        0
RollingUpdateStrategy:  25% max unavailable, 25% max surge
Pod Template:
  Labels:           app=spark-monitor
  Service Account:  spark
  Containers:
   spark-monitor:
    Image:      busybox:nonexistent-tag-9999
    Port:       <none>
    Host Port:  <none>
    Command:
      /bin/sh

      echo "spark runtime monitor ready"
